title: lastrea pulchra
intro: Lastrea pulchra, also known as the beautiful lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Lastrea pulchra include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Lastrea pulchra typically involve drying the fronds and making them into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
